title: TCM visualizes trajectories and cell populations from single cell data.
author: Gong W Kwak IY Koyano-Nakagawa N Pan W Garry DJ
content: S-EPMC6048168 PMC6048168 TCM visualizes trajectories and cell populations from single cell data. Profiling single cell gene expression data over specified time periods are increasingly applied to the study of complex developmental processes. Here, we describe a novel prototype-based dimension
